:::caution
This page contains administrative documentation intended for cluster administrators and operators. This content may not be relevant for regular users.
:::




import Image from '~/components/common/Image.astro';


# Managing Namespaces

This document outlines the steps to manage Kubernetes namespaces within the platform.

## Create a Namesapce

Use the website, and fill out the details in the form.

:::caution
Do **not** use `kubectl create namespace`.
:::

## Delete a Namespace

1. If it has children (subgroups), move them to parent in **Authentik**.
2. Delete from the website (NOT AUTHENTIK).
3. Remove any exceptions in the portal configuration and any Gatekeeper exceptions. 

:::danger
The website uses a cached version of authentik groups. Changed in Authentik directly will have users see old cache until portal refreshes cache.
:::

:::caution
There's an Authentik bug. If you edit a group and save, you have to re-enter the parent, otherwise the group gets orphaned. 
:::
